extension.summary: Repository for HappyEnding options, view helpers, and SidePreview skin.
extension.description: GitHub-ready repository template. Upload this folder to GitHub, then install this repository zip in Kodi.
extension.disclaimer: This repository does not host media content. It only provides Kodi UI/helper add-ons.

extension.summary: Helper module for custom length sorting and artwork fallback.
extension.description: Provides safe helper functions that can be imported by a patched video add-on. It does not bypass providers or fetch restricted content.

extension.summary: Left list, large right thumbnail, compact info underneath.
extension.description: Experimental lightweight Kodi 21 Omega skin focused on video add-ons. Designed for HappyEnding browsing where fast list navigation and visible thumbnails matter.

extension.summary: Custom video browser with large thumbnail views and custom length sorting.
extension.description: Framework add-on for sources you are allowed to access. It provides provider modules, forced artwork fields, visible thumbnails, custom min/max length filtering, and view mode shortcuts.
extension.disclaimer: This add-on does not host media, bypass blocks, bypass logins, scrape private content, or remove provider restrictions. Add only sources you are legally allowed to access.
